docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUGUSTINE, FRANCIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 608 O'FARRELL STREET, ROOM #65; SAN FRANCISCO, CA $958.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $958.20, STAYED UNTIL AUG-28-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES ON/BEFORE 8-28-96 AT 8AM, RETURNS KEYS TO PREMISES & LEAVES PREMISES IN BROOM-CLEAN COND, PLTF WILL WAIVE $240 BACK RENT AND $718.20 DAILY DAMAGES ($17.10 PER DAY FROM 7/17 TO 8/28/96; TOTAL MONEY JUDGMNT $958.20) AND PLTF WILL S/A JUDGMNT & DISMISS. DFT WAIVES POSTING OF PREM.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, JENNY AS TO DEFENDANT AUGUSTINE, FRANCIS SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT AUGUSTINE, FRANCIS
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

DEPT 1/JUDGE CHOPPELAS/REPORTER:M.BRADY/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PLTF JENNY CHANG PRESENT IN PRO-PER AS IS DEFT FRANCIS AUGUSTINE. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD FOR JUDGMNT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMNT.
